title: [codereview-pass3.1] gateway add_route calls rpl.router.dao_manager.routing_table but path construction uses only single link-local addr; multi-hop paths and full route assembly from DAO not used
close_reason: Fixed multi-hop DAO route assembly in gateway; full path construction from routing_table now used with SRH support. Verified with 3 codereview passes (all P0-P2 resolved), cargo test, clippy, lint clean. Rust/Zephyr updates complete.
